summary: Classifica LIVE Feature Testing Complete - All features verified working correctly (Backend: 9/9 tests passed, Frontend: 5/5 flows verified)

feature_1_home_classifica_live_box.description: Home page shows 'Classifica LIVE' box with rank position and points when matchday is LIVE
evidence: Screenshot confirms 'Classifica LIVE' box visible on home with '1° • 0.5 pts' for Desylega
API returns live_rank=1, live_points=3.5, total_members=10 for National League
Box shows green border, LIVE badge, and chevron-forward icon

feature_2_navigation_to_rankings.description: Home 'Classifica LIVE' box click navigates to Rankings tab -> Weekly tab with LIVE matchday selected
evidence: Navigation URL: /rankings?tab=weekly&matchdayId=23c88f47-475f-4aa5-8fe8-f13d61d43cbe&leagueId=...
Weekly tab automatically selected
LIVE matchday pre-selected in dropdown
Matchday selector shows 'Giornata 20 LIVE'

feature_3_all_members_live_standings.description: Weekly standings for LIVE matchday shows ALL 10 league members (including those with 0 pts)
evidence: API returns 10 entries for National League LIVE matchday
Includes users with 0.0 points (joiner_1771426142, joinuser367daec6, etc.)
Frontend displays all members correctly

feature_4_matchday_status_field.description: matchday_status field is returned in weekly standings API response
evidence: API response includes 'matchday_status': 'LIVE'
Test test_matchday_status_in_response passed

feature_5_live_badge_styling.description: Rankings matchday selector shows LIVE badge/styling when LIVE matchday selected
evidence: Screenshot shows LIVE badge in matchday selector
'CLASSIFICA IN TEMPO REALE' green banner displayed
Matchday selector has green border when LIVE

feature_6_user_predictions_click.description: Clicking a user in LIVE weekly standings opens user-predictions correctly
evidence: Navigation to /user-predictions with correct params works
User predictions page loads correctly for users with predictions

feature_7_nessun_pronostico.description: User-predictions page shows 'Nessun pronostico' for users without predictions
evidence: Screenshot confirms 'Nessun pronostico' message displayed
Message: 'joiner_1771426142 non ha inserito pronostici per questa giornata'
Empty icon and proper layout shown

feature_8_total_standings_regression.description: No regression: Total standings still work correctly
evidence: API returns correct total standings data
Test test_total_standings_still_works passed

feature_9_completed_matchday_regression.description: No regression: COMPLETED matchday weekly standings still work (don't show all members)
evidence: COMPLETED matchday G17 shows only 1 entry (only users who played)
LIVE matchday G20 shows 10 entries (all members)
Test test_completed_matchday_shows_only_players passed

feature_10_multi_league_isolation.description: Multi-league isolation: different leagues show different data
evidence: National League: 10 members, live_rank=2 for admin
Desylega: 1 member, live_rank=1 for desy
Different points shown per league

critical_code_review_comments: Backend correctly implements LIVE status check at line 2207-2208: 'if not is_manual and matchday["status"] != "LIVE"'
Home API correctly computes live_rank and live_points at lines 979-1022
Frontend home.tsx correctly shows 'Classifica LIVE' box with data-testid='live-standings-btn'
Frontend rankings.tsx correctly reads tab/matchdayId params and shows LIVE banner
User-predictions.tsx correctly handles empty predictions with 'Nessun pronostico' message
All queries properly filter by league_id for data isolation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Classifica LIVE feature fully implemented and tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/home returns live_rank/live_points/total_members for LIVE matchdays. GET /api/standings/weekly/{id}?league_id=X returns ALL members for LIVE matchdays (special behavior per line 2207-2208). Available matchdays includes LIVE. User predictions shows 'Nessun pronostico' for empty predictions. All features verified with both backend tests and frontend Playwright automation.

verified_endpoints.GET /api/home?league_id=X: Returns live_rank, live_points, total_members when matchday is LIVE
verified_endpoints.GET /api/standings/weekly/{matchday_id}?: Returns ALL members for LIVE matchdays, only players for COMPLETED
verified_endpoints.GET /api/standings/matchdays?league_id=X: Includes LIVE matchdays with status field
verified_endpoints.GET /api/predictions/user/{user_id}/{mat: Returns empty predictions for users who didn't play

screenshots: .screenshots/01_home_with_live_box.png - Shows 'Classifica LIVE' box on home page
.screenshots/02_after_live_click.png - Rankings page after clicking LIVE box
